//: Repo-root MCP registration read by Claude Code on the web (cloud runtime). The web runtime does NOT spawn stdio MCP servers, so the rfp-pilot server runs as a LOCAL HTTP server inside the session container (started by the SessionStart hook, scripts/web_session_start.sh) and is reached here over loopback. For LOCAL terminal use, register the stdio server instead via mcp/.mcp.json (the plugin) or `claude mcp add` — see mcp/README.md.
